payload.label: mirror
payload.long_description: Partial wall-mounted rectangular mirror with a thin silver/chrome frame and reflective glass; mirror is edge-cropped in the crop and shows a tripod and a blurred person in its reflection, appears vertical and medium-sized, with some visual distortion — estimated ~1.5 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"mirror","short_description":"partial silver-framed rectangular mirror","long_description":"Partial wall-mounted rectangular mirror with a thin silver/chrome frame and reflective glass; mirror is edge-cropped in the crop and shows a tripod and a blurred person in its reflection, appears vertical and medium-sized, with some visual distortion — estimated ~1.5 m from the camera.","attributes":["reflective glass","silver/chrome frame","rectangular shape","vertical orientation","wall-mounted","partial/edge-cropped","shows tripod reflection","shows person reflection","medium size","slight distortion"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
